data.description:
## What to do
Update `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md`:

### 1. Add 'ticket delete' entry under CLI subcommands section
- Syntax: `ticket delete <id> [--user-approved]`
- Behavior: marks ticket as deleted (status=deleted, archived=True), removes it from ticket list, writes tombstone
- Restrictions: all children must be deleted first (non-deleted children block deletion)
- Gate: --user-approved required; invoking without it exits 1 with instructional error directing agent to use --user-approved
- Note: --user-approved is intentionally NOT listed in --help output; discovered by running the command without it

### 2. Update 'ticket link' section: add duplicates and supersedes to relation table
- Extend the relation values table from 3 to 5 values
- `duplicates`: source is the duplicate ticket, target is the canonical ticket; non-bidirectional; non-blocking (does not affect ready_to_work or blockers)
- `supersedes`: source is the new/replacing ticket, target is the superseded/obsolete ticket; non-bidirectional; non-blocking
- Note: Jira bridge sync for duplicates/supersedes deferred to Epic 83e2-04ae
- Add example invocations for both new relations

## Files to modify
- `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md`

## Acceptance criteria
- ticket delete entry exists and documents syntax, behavior, restrictions, and discovery mechanism
- ticket link section shows all 5 relations with directional semantics
- No implementation code changes

## Testing mode
UPDATE — documentation only
data.title: Update ticket-cli-reference.md for ticket delete and duplicates/supersedes relations
